abilities.name: Fleshy Abundance
abilities.flavor: The sorcerer generously bestows a growth spurt of the most repulsive kind upon their allies, causing their bodies to bloat with great wobbling mounds of grey-green fat.
abilities.declare: Pick a friendly unit wholly within 12" of this unit to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.
abilities.effect: On a 6+, subtract 1 from wound rolls for attacks that target that friendly unit until the start of your next turn

abilities.name: Fleshy Abundance

abilities.name: Endless Swarm
abilities.flavor: The presence of Nurglings in the realms continuously draws more of their number from the Grandfather’s Garden, making their swarms extremely hard to eradicate.

abilities.name: Attention Seekers
abilities.flavor: Beasts of Nurgle seek out playmates with an enthusiasm that is rarely reciprocated by the horrified source of their fascination.
abilities.declare: If this unit charged this phase, pick an enemy unit in combat with it to be the target.
abilities.effect: Roll a D3. On a 2+, inflict an amount of mortal damage on the target equal to the roll.

abilities.name: Attention Seekers

abilities.effect: Roll a D3. On a 2+, inflict an amount of mortal damage on the target equal to the roll.

abilities.name: Bilewood Stilts
abilities.flavor: Rotmire Creed use their stilts to cover ground more quickly.
abilities.effect: No mortal damage is inflicted on this unit when it uses RETREAT abilities.

battleTraits.name: Numberless Pests
battleTraits.summary: Subtract 1 from hit rolls for attacks that target friendly units
battleTraits.effect: Subtract 1 from hit rolls for attacks that target friendly units. KEYWORDS CYCLE

battleTraits.name: Nauseous Revulsion
battleTraits.summary: Subtract 1 from charge rolls for enemy units
battleTraits.effect: Subtract 1 from charge rolls for enemy units. KEYWORDS CYCLE

battleTraits.name: Plague Of Misery
battleTraits.summary: While enemy units are within 6" of any friendly units, they cannot use abilities that heal or return slain models to a unit
battleTraits.effect: While enemy units are within 6" of any friendly units, they cannot use abilities that heal or return slain models to a unit. KEYWORDS CYCLE
